recommended_action: Schedule comprehensive inspection within 48 hours. Check mechanical drivetrain, pitch actuators and sensor calibration. Consider temporary power curtailment if risk score exceeds 0.8.
rationale: Elevated risk across aerodynamic (0.80), mechanical (0.02) and anomaly (1.00) subscores indicates multi-system degradation requiring full inspection.

recommended_action: Schedule visual blade inspection on next scheduled maintenance window. Monitor power gap trend over next 72 hours before escalating.
rationale: Moderate aerodynamic subscore (0.23) with contained power gap (0.0%). Low mechanical and anomaly scores suggest early-stage aerodynamic issue.
